events.title: BBC Proms: Miles Davis Centenary — Royal Albert Hall
events.note: Grand Tier seats 1, 2, 3 · Entrance at Door 9. Programme: new arrangements of excerpts from 'Miles Ahead', 'Porgy and Bess', 'Sketches of Spain' and 'Quiet Nights' · Ambrose Akinmusire (trumpet), Sam Harris (piano), Harish Raghavan (bass), Justin Brown (drums) · BBC Concert Orchestra / Miho Hazama

events.title: Dinner — Fairuz
events.note: Party of 3 · £30/person cancellation penalty — must cancel 24 hrs in advance

events.title: Walk — St. James's Park (Guards Memorial to Buckingham Palace)
events.note: Route: start at the Guards Memorial · head into the park and pick up the lake's north bank path (better morning light, closer to the water than the Mall-side path) · pause at the Blue Bridge — the single best vantage point on the lake, with views both ways · continue west along the north bank toward Duck Island at the lake's west end, the park's main bird sanctuary and the best spot for pelicans, herons, and the resident waterfowl · exit the park at the west end and walk up to Buckingham Palace. Early morning (park opens 5am) means fewer crowds and more active birds — look for the famous pelicans, plus herons, cormorants, coots, moorhens, and tufted ducks along the way.
